items.summary: Build a luxury, minimal, premium-themed single-page React application for 'Luxyle' interior décor store. Apply a consistent color palette of beige (#F5F0E8), ivory (#FFFFF0), white (#FFFFFF), gold accents (#C9A84C), and royal blue (#1B3A6B) for headings/text. Use elegant serif fonts (Cormorant Garamond for headings, Jost for body) with smooth scroll behavior throughout. The overall aesthetic must feel high-end, spacious, and refined.

Implement the site Header with: the 'Luxyle' logo/wordmark, desktop navigation links (Home, Collection, About, Contact), an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ== in a new tab, a 'Book Appointment' CTA button, and a collapsible hamburger menu for mobile. The header must be sticky/fixed at the top.

Implement the site Footer with: the Luxyle brand name/logo, quick navigation links, a services list, full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ==, a 'Get Directions' button opening https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab, and copyright text '© 2026 Luxyle. All Rights Reserved.'

Implement the Admin Dashboard (protected by username/password login) with two tabs: (1) Feedback Management: view pending feedback submissions, approve or reject each; (2) Appointments Management: view all submitted appointments with customer details, update status to approved or rejected, and manage blocked dates by adding/removing specific dates from a blocked list.

Render the generated hero background image (luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) as a static asset in the hero section of the Home Page, and the about section image (luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png) in the About Us section. Both images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated.

Implement the Home Page hero section displaying: the store name 'Luxyle', the tagline 'Elevating Spaces with Timeless Luxury', a 'Book Appointment' CTA button that scrolls to the appointment booking section, and a 'Get Directions' button that opens https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab. The hero must be visually dominant with a full-width banner using the generated hero background image.

Add a Featured Collections preview on the Home Page below the hero, showing a curated subset (4 images) from the collection gallery as a teaser with a 'View Full Collection' link that scrolls to the full collection section.

Implement the About Us section with the exact brand story: 'At Luxyle, we curate refined interior décor pieces that transform ordinary spaces into luxurious experiences. Every element is selected with attention to detail, elegance, and timeless design.' Style it with an elegant layout including a decorative gold divider and the generated about-image on one side.

Build the Collection Section as a full gallery displaying all 8 images in a premium responsive grid layout with hover zoom/overlay effects. Images to use (in order): https://img.sanishtech.com/u/f56125b1f2f52137b6f021abfd8fe562.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d63b3f1566e29fe235b38438a157903f.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d4418e844613722b5c6a9ca37c49d9c4.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d7fe9528299bda266cc2b0f3ee5d5a32.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/81f1aea60fd6fe9d51a12ba384647dd8.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/dfcd47f133fa1694f66376e81a3788ba.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/1803ea59e75d2d8b3b1baba29b3a51f5.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/c240a10f7b62e426cd381343d3d3686b.jpeg. Clicking an image should open a lightbox/fullscreen view.

Display a hardcoded Existing Feedback section showing exactly these three 5-star reviews: (1) 'Luxyle completely transformed my living space. The décor is elegant and premium.' – Priya S. (2) 'Exceptional quality and beautiful collection. Highly recommended!' – Rahul M. (3) 'Perfect place for luxury home décor in Indore.' – Neha K. Each review must show 5 gold stars and the reviewer name.

Implement the customer feedback submission feature: a form with Name, Star Rating (1–5 selector), and Review text fields. Submitted feedback is stored in the backend with a 'pending' status. Pending feedback must not appear publicly until an admin approves it. Once approved, it appears in the feedback section alongside the hardcoded reviews.

Implement the Appointment Booking System: a form where customers select a date (with blocked dates disabled), select a time slot, and fill in Name, Phone, Email, and Message. On submission, the appointment is stored in the backend. The system must also store appointment details so the admin can view them. Admin can approve, reject, or mark specific dates as blocked. Blocked dates must be disabled/unavailable in the customer-facing date picker.

Build the Contact Page with: (1) Full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', (2) An embedded Google Map iframe for the store location, (3) A contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields, (4) Instagram link to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ==, (5) Business hours display (e.g., Mon–Sat: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Sun: Closed).
